message:
feat: add llm_start, llm_chunk, llm_end events to agent loop

Add three new event kinds to the agent event system for real-time LLM
call visibility:
- llm_start: emitted before each LLM call with model, provider, turn,
  message_count
- llm_chunk: emitted during streaming with throttled token progress
  (500ms interval) containing tokens_so_far and elapsed_ms
- llm_end: emitted after LLM completion with input/output tokens,
  latency_ms, and finish_reason

Streaming is opt-in via enableStreaming option on AgentOptions. When
disabled, only llm_start/llm_end are emitted (no chunks).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
